description: You are a ground station software integration engineer. The mission operations center (MOC) requires that whenever a data collection is commanded on the INST satellite, a notification is pushed to an external enterprise IT webhook. Using OpenC3 COSMOS, author and execute a Python automation script that loops at least 3 times. In each iteration, command an 'INST COLLECT', read the 'COLLECTS' telemetry counter from the 'INST HEALTH_STATUS' packet, and send an HTTP POST request to the local MOC notification webhook at 'http://localhost:8080/alert'. The POST request must have the header 'Content-Type: application/json' and the JSON body structure: {"satellite": "INST", "alert_type": "COLLECT_COMPLETE", "collect_count": <telemetry_value>}. Ensure the telemetry counter increments between alerts. OpenC3 password: Cosmos2024!
